positive: A vintage 1950s travel poster advertising a fictional tropical destination. Bold typography elements (without actual text), stylized palm trees, turquoise ocean, and vibrant coral reefs. Screen print aesthetic, limited color palette (teal, coral, yellow), retro illustration, highly graphic, clean lines.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, modern gradients, subtle shading
